blocks.text: I am out most of Tuesday and Wednesday next week for a family thing, so I want coverage sorted before I go dark. Michael Morris, could you keep half an eye on my inbox those two days? Nothing should catch fire, but I would rather you had anything urgent flagged than come back to it cold.

Pamela Rojas, two scheduling asks. Please hold Thursday afternoon open on my calendar so I can dig out from under the backlog, and when you book the small conference room for that block, put the reservation under Christopher Walton so facilities has a name to match. Thanks, both.
